title: Calamagrostis austroscaberula
taxonomy: Calamagrostis austroscaberula is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is a member of the genus Calamagrostis, which includes many species of grasses commonly known as fescues or reeds. The genus Calamagrostis is further classified under the subfamily Pooideae, which is a large group of cool-season grasses. Calamagrostis austroscaberula is native to Australia, where it grows in a variety of habitats. The exact classification of Calamagrostis austroscaberula at the species level is still being researched and refined by botanists.
